tracks.title: Pursuit
tracks.reason: The aggressive, plucky, and relentlessly driving monophonic arp is the exact energy target for our 'Query Arp'.

tracks.title: The Hand That Feeds
tracks.reason: Its driving 4/4 rock structure built on a simple, pulsing synth bass provides a strong model for our verse/chorus dynamic.
tracks.search_terms: nine inch nails the hand that feeds midi

tracks.title: The Black Block
tracks.reason: This track is a masterclass in building a heavy, mid-tempo groove with complex, layered percussion and immense sonic weight.
